name: chatmonja
description: A friendly Twitch chat welcome and community bot.

scripts.check: node --check main.js && node --check preload.js && node --check docs/site.js && node --check scripts/create-icns.js && node --check scripts/create-ico.js && node --check scripts/verify-package.js && zsh -n scripts/package-macos.sh scripts/notarize-macos.sh && npm test
scripts.check:windows: node --check main.js && node --check preload.js && node --check docs/site.js && node --check scripts/create-icns.js && node --check scripts/create-ico.js && node --check scripts/verify-package.js && npm test

author: Elmore 'JimmyQ' Jamieson (@jimmyqja)
